ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year_ad" REAL /* Year in Anno Domini (AD) */,
  "age_bp" REAL /* Age in Before Present (BP) years */,
  "age_bp_1" REAL /* Secondary age in Before Present (BP) years */,
  "temperature_deg_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "uk37_missing" REAL /* UK37 index (missing value indicator) */,
  "age_uncertainty_yr" REAL /* Uncertainty in age measurement (years) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location of the data */,
  "proxy_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of climate proxy */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset version */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sediment core, ice core) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Reliability or accuracy of the data */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag for any issues or concerns with the data quality */,
  "proxy_value" REAL /* Actual value of the proxy */,
  "proxy_units" TEXT /* Units of the proxy value */,
  "proxy_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the proxy measurement */,
  "age_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the age */,
  "age_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the age measurement */,
  "age_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag for any issues or concerns with the age data */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Broader geographic region */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected */,
  "depth_units" TEXT /* Units of depth (e.g., meters) */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_proxy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("proxy_type_id") REFERENCES proxy_types ("proxy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., sediment core, ice core) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., sediment core, ice core) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the source was collected */,
  "collector" TEXT /* Name of the person or team who collected the source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the source */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Broader geographic region */,
  "water_depth" REAL /* Depth of water at the location (if applicable) */,
  "water_depth_units" TEXT /* Units of water depth (e.g., meters) */,
  "location_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proxy_types" (
  "proxy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proxy type */,
  "proxy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the proxy type (e.g., Temperature, UK37) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proxy type */,
  "proxy_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the proxy */,
  "proxy_accuracy" TEXT /* Typical accuracy of the proxy measurement */,
  "proxy_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag for any issues or concerns with the proxy type */,
  "proxy_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the proxy type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proxy type entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the proxy type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proxy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the dataset version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., draft, released, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
